sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרשׁ

Transliteration: sheresh

Phonetic: sheh'-resh

BDB Definition:

  1. root
    1. root (literal)
    2. root (of people involving firmness or permanence) (figuratively)
    3. root, bottom (as lowest stratum) (figuratively)

Origin: from H8327

TWOT entry: 2471a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
